description: Intel 80186/80188 instruction additions. These instructions were introduced with the 80186 and are available in all subsequent x86 processors. Note: PUSHA/POPA are removed in 64-bit (x86-64) long mode.

opcodes.description: Push all 16-bit GP registers (AX, CX, DX, BX, SP, BP, SI, DI) in one operation (16-bit mode)
Push all 32-bit GP registers (EAX, ECX, EDX, EBX, ESP, EBP, ESI, EDI) in one operation (32-bit mode)

instructions.description: Pushes all general-purpose registers (AX, CX, DX, BX, SP, BP, SI, DI) onto the stack in one operation.
instructions.notes: Opcode 0x60 is removed in 64-bit long mode.

opcodes.description: Pop all 16-bit GP registers in reverse order (SP is discarded, not loaded)
Pop all 32-bit GP registers in reverse order (ESP is discarded, not loaded)

instructions.description: Pops all general-purpose registers from the stack in one operation (reverse of PUSHA/PUSHAD).
instructions.notes: Opcode 0x61 is removed in 64-bit long mode.

opcodes.description: Check signed array index in r16 against lower/upper bounds at m16/m16; raise INT 5 if out of range

instructions.description: Checks that a signed array index is within bounds specified by two words in memory; raises INT 5 if not.
instructions.notes: Opcode 0x62 reassigned to EVEX prefix in 64-bit mode. Use explicit compare+jump instead.

opcodes.description: Create stack frame: allocate imm16 bytes for locals; set nesting level imm8

instructions.description: Creates a stack frame for a procedure, setting up BP/EBP and allocating local variables.
instructions.notes: Compilers prefer explicit PUSH BP / MOV BP, SP / SUB SP, n sequences for performance.

opcodes.description: Tear down stack frame: SP = BP; POP BP (reverses ENTER)

instructions.description: Tears down a stack frame by setting SP=BP and popping BP. Reverses ENTER.
instructions.notes: Compilers still emit LEAVE; equivalent to MOV SP, BP / POP BP.

instructions.sasm_phrase: input string byte / input string word / input string

opcodes.description: Read byte from I/O port DX into [ES:DI]; advance DI
Read word from I/O port DX into [ES:DI]; advance DI by 2

instructions.description: Reads a byte or word from I/O port DX into [ES:DI] and updates DI.
instructions.notes: Ring-0 / privileged. 0x6D also encodes INSD (dword) in 32-bit mode.

instructions.sasm_phrase: output string byte / output string word / output string

opcodes.description: Write byte from [DS:SI] to I/O port DX; advance SI
Write word from [DS:SI] to I/O port DX; advance SI by 2

instructions.description: Writes a byte or word from [DS:SI] to I/O port DX and updates SI.
instructions.notes: Ring-0 / privileged. 0x6F also encodes OUTSD (dword) in 32-bit mode.
